ddls:
CREATE TABLE "repositories" (
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repository */,
  "repo_name" TEXT /* Name of the repository */,
  "package" TEXT /* Package or namespace of the repository */,
  "page_rank" REAL /* PageRank algorithm score for the repository's importance */,
  "afferent_coupling" INTEGER /* Number of other repositories that depend on this repository */,
  "efferent_coupling" INTEGER /* Number of repositories this repository depends on */,
  "instability" REAL /* Measure of the repository's instability */,
  "violations" TEXT /* List of any violations or issues found in the repository */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the repository was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the repository was last updated */,
  "programming_languages" TEXT /* Programming languages used in the repository */,
  "repository_type" TEXT /* Type of the repository (e.g., Git, SVN) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "developers" (
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each developer */,
  "developer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the developer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the developer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the developer (e.g., developer, project manager, QA) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the developer */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience of the developer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commits" (
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commit */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the repository the commit belongs to */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the developer who made the commit */,
  "commit_date" TEXT /* Date when the commit was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the commit */,
  "commit_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the commit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commits_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commits_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the repository the issue belongs to */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the developer who reported the issue */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was reported */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the issue */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the issue (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "labels" TEXT /* Labels assigned to the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pull_requests" (
  "pr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pull request */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the repository the pull request belongs to */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the developer who made the pull request */,
  "pr_date" TEXT /* Date when the pull request was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pull request */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the pull request */,
  "reviewers" TEXT /* List of reviewers assigned to the pull request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_requests_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_requests_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "code_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each code change */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the repository the code change belongs to */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the developer who made the code change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the code change was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the code change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of code change (e.g., addition, deletion, modification) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_changes_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_changes_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_management" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the repository associated with the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_management_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_management_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_developers" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the developer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the developer in the project (e.g., lead, contributor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_commits" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the commit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "commit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_issues" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_pull_requests" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "pr_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pull request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "pr_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_code_changes" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the code change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "change_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "code_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each code review */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the repository the code review belongs to */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the developer who made the code review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the code review was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the code review */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the code review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_reviews_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_reviews_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repository_tags" (
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the repository */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Tag associated with the repository */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repo_id", "tag")
)
